title: Include auto-generated UTE reference number in automatic WhatsApp payment message

requirements.text: Update the payment confirmation flow in PaymentSection.tsx and the corresponding helper in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts so that when the customer clicks 'Payment Done', a unique UTE reference number (e.g., 'UTE-' followed by a timestamp-based or random alphanumeric string) is auto-generated and automatically included in the pre-filled WhatsApp message. No manual input from the customer is required — the entire redirect must be fully automatic with the reference number embedded in the message body.

quotes: The payment message should contain the ute number make a automatic system fully automatic

acceptanceCriteria: When the customer clicks 'Payment Done', a unique UTE reference number is generated automatically (e.g., 'UTE-XXXXXXXX' format).
The WhatsApp redirect triggers immediately with no intermediate form or manual input step.
The pre-filled WhatsApp message body includes the auto-generated UTE reference number clearly labeled (e.g., 'UTE Reference: UTE-XXXXXXXX').
The message also includes payment context such as UPI ID and timestamp so the business can identify the transaction.
The whatsapp.ts helper function for payment confirmation accepts and embeds the UTE number in the message string.
The full flow is end-to-end automatic: Proceed to Pay → QR shown → Payment Done → WhatsApp opens with UTE reference, zero manual steps.

constraints: Do not add any form or manual input step between 'Payment Done' and the WhatsApp redirect.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
WhatsApp business number must remain 7439065260 as set in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts.
nonGoals: Storing payment records in the backend.
Changing any other part of the payment UI flow beyond embedding the UTE number.
